name: P2pzcoin
description: Project Description (English) P2PZ is a digital token initially launched as a meme coin, with a growing and engaged community. Its long-term vision is to evolve into a smart trading bot ecosystem, enabling users to automate buy and sell operations based on predefined rules. Key Highlights: Launched on Binance Smart Chain (BSC) and currently available on PancakeSwap. Total supply is fully minted, with no team-held tokens among the top 10 holders. The community currently includes over 1,800 token holders. Future roadmap includes advanced trading bot development, allowing automated investment management, with P2PZ tokens used for transactions, rewards, and ecosystem operations.
